commit.message:
Move silhouette/glow to outer container, anchor tower to bottom

- SVG silhouette and radial glow now position relative to full
  container (centered on screen) instead of the rows div
- justify-end pb-8: tower grows upward from the bottom
- Dynamic --rise-dist per row for foundation-up animation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Anchor tower to bottom so words build up from foundation

justify-end pb-8: single word sits at screen bottom, subsequent
words stack upward — visually builds from the ground up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dynamic rise distance: each row rises from proportional depth below base

Bottom row rises 40px, top row rises (N-1)*50+40px — words physically
travel from the foundation level up to their final position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase towerRowIn translateY for more dramatic rise from base

60px travel distance makes each row visibly rise up from below
instead of barely-noticeable 20px nudge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix word placement to build tower from base

Iterate placement loop bottom→top so base rows (wide, appear first in
animation) win ties over observation deck rows. Big/prominent words now
land at the foundation and visibly appear first as the tower builds up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make tower build animation visibly bottom-to-top

Increase row stagger from 40ms to 100ms and reduce per-row duration
from 500ms to 400ms, making the cascading bottom-to-top build effect
clearly perceivable (~1.1s total for 8 rows).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Extend profanity filter with anatomical and explicit terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix video overlay duplicates, timing support, and logo preview background

  instead of creating duplicates (preserves existing settings as defaults)
- System prompt explicitly states timing support with position mapping and
  emphatic note to never claim add_watermark lacks timing
- Logo preview uses light gray checkerboard with padding instead of dark
  border, ensuring dark logo elements are visible regardless of transparency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent executors from claiming unassigned tasks meant for other machines

claim_next_task RPC was allowing any executor to grab tasks where
assigned_machine was NULL, bypassing the dispatcher's project-based routing.
Now executors only claim tasks explicitly assigned to their machine ID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add smart vendor matching with TIN cross-referencing and confidence scoring

- Prompt now prioritizes legal entity name ("Operated by") over brand name
- Prompt explicitly distinguishes vendor TIN from buyer TIN
- TIN normalization: fixes OCR digit errors (O→0, l→1, B→8), validates format
- Matching pipeline: exact TIN → fuzzy TIN (1-2 digit tolerance) → name match → new vendor
- Buyer TIN detection: rejects WRLD Capital's own TIN if OCR picks it up
- Confidence scoring: high/medium/low/new with human-readable notes
- UI shows match icons (✅⚠️🆕) and expandable details for flagged receipts

commit.message:
Phase 4: AES-GCM encryption layer

Web Crypto API with PBKDF2 key derivation (200k iterations, SHA-256).
Salt stored in Firestore users/{uid}/config/encryption on first login.
Key cached in memory for session lifetime, cleared on logout.
encrypt/decrypt roundtrip via IV-prepended base64 ciphertext.

Fix YAML syntax in systemd workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add faststart and yuv420p to all video outputs for mobile playback

Without -movflags +faststart, the moov atom sits at the end of the MP4
file. Mobile Safari must download the entire file before it can preview
or play, causing lag and failed saves. Also adds -pix_fmt yuv420p for
maximum device compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tmux resume crash, quote feedback, fix stream dedup for real

- Fix unbound variable error on tmux resume: RALPH_ORIG_ARGS may be
  empty when auto-resuming, use ${arr[@]+"${arr[@]}"} pattern for
  set -u safety.
- Quote feedback content in log output.
- Stream filter: replace pipe (subshell) with process substitution
  (< <(...)) so seen_count variable persists across iterations
  without needing temp files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Render deploy: move Redis config to Development only

- Redis connection string moved from appsettings.json to appsettings.Development.json
- On Render (Production), Redis is empty so in-memory cache is used and no Redis health check is registered
- Health check path changed to /api/v1/health (custom endpoint, no Redis dependency)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix wizard crash: don't synthesize phantom provider from empty legacy fields

When config.json has llm_provider="anthropic" with no API key (left over
from a previous version), applyDefaults() was synthesizing a "default"
provider entry that poisoned the wizard's config copy. After the user
saved a valid provider, the stale "default" entry caused validation to
fail with "api_key is required for provider anthropic".

Two fixes:
1. applyDefaults: only synthesize from legacy fields when the provider is
   usable (ollama or has an API key). Empty API key = incomplete setup.
2. Wizard onSaved: replace os.Exit(1) with return so the app doesn't
   crash from the callback — stays alive for retry via Settings.

Relates to #90

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Flux Shop to address currency hoarding (consumables, boosts, cosmetics)

New "Flux Shop" tab with 7 purchasable consumables:
- XP Surge (1h/3h): +50% XP boost, 75-150 Flux
- Reroll Tokens: free reforge, 50 Flux (integrated into craftItem)
- Name Colors: 4 codename colors, 100 Flux each

Server-side: purchaseFluxItem Cloud Function with transaction safety,
daily limits, and XP boost multiplier integrated into buildXPUpdates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix duplicate pre-auth keys by using global list endpoint

headscale v0.28.0 returns all users' keys from GET /preauthkey
regardless of the ?user= param. The fan-out-per-user approach
was making N calls and getting the full list each time, showing
every key N times.

Switch to a single global list() call on both the Pre-Auth Keys
page and Dashboard. Also share the same query key ['preauth-keys']
so invalidations work across both pages.

commit.message:
fix: return poison from runtime_case_trap when error is pending

When a runtime error (e.g. DivisionByZero) sets the error flag and
returns a poison pointer, subsequent case expressions on that poison
value would hit runtime_case_trap → abort(), killing the entire MCP
server. Now runtime_case_trap checks for a pending RUNTIME_ERROR first
and returns the poison pointer again, letting the JIT step complete
and the error be reported cleanly via Yield::Error.

commit.message:
feat: terminal manager history from CC project dir

- session-store.ts: SessionStore reads ~/.claude/projects/{encoded-cwd}/*.jsonl
  — encoding: replace '/' and spaces with '-'
  — sort by mtime desc, title from first type:user message (60 char truncation)
  — title cache persists for plugin lifetime; repeat refresh() calls are cheap
  — stale = mtime < 30s (amber dot), complete = mtime ≥ 30s (gray dot)
- terminal-manager-view.ts: two-section layout (OPEN + HISTORY)
  — HISTORY: date-grouped (Today/Yesterday/This week/Month Year)
  — groups >10 entries collapse to 5 + "show N more" inline toggle
  — "Load 50 more" button when disk has more sessions than loaded
  — inline expansion on click: label + "Resume in terminal" button
  — resume writes claude --resume {id} to new focused terminal after 800ms
  — 500ms history scan debounce avoids excess stat calls on layout events
  — right-click context menu on history rows
- main.ts: openFocusedTerminal() public method
- CSS: section-label, date-group, is-history, dot.stale, expand, expand-label, resume, load-more

commit.message:
fix: prevent wheels from stretching into ovals and improve canvas sharpness (#171)

* fix: prevent wheels from stretching into ovals and improve canvas sharpness

Remove `flex: 1` from `.wheel-frame` so `aspect-ratio: 1` is respected,
preventing vertical stretch in grid layouts. Round canvas backing store
dimensions in device-pixel space instead of CSS-pixel space to eliminate
sub-pixel fuzz on text and divider lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update visual test snapshots [skip ci]

* chore: address review feedback — cache canvas dimensions

Cache getBoundingClientRect() results in resizeCanvas() and use cached
cssWidth/cssHeight in draw() to avoid triggering layout reflow on every
animation frame.

commit.message:
Fix stream tripling, show feedback content, preserve feedback on ctrl+c

- Stream dedup: seen_count was in a subshell (piped while-read) so it
  reset every iteration. Use a temp file to persist count across the
  pipe boundary.
- Feedback: log the actual feedback content, not just "Injecting user
  feedback". Split consume_feedback into read_feedback + clear_feedback
  so feedback is only deleted after Claude finishes, surviving ctrl+c.
- Tmux uses the same stream filter script, so both modes get the fix.

Rebrand to Beres Coaching: content overhaul, logo, UI features

- Update all content: CHF→EUR, remove Bodybuilding/Mike/TEAMBADASS references, add TEAMBERES
- ProofBar: 1× Arnold Classic Sieger

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: unified SQLite-backed genomic annotation index

Replace separate AlphaMissense (DuckDB), ClinVar (in-memory VCF parse),
and SIGNAL (gob cache) stores with a single SQLite database per assembly.
WITHOUT ROWID clustered primary key on (chrom, pos, ref, alt) gives
point lookups via mmap with near-zero Go heap usage and instant startup.

- Add internal/genomicindex/ package (Store, GenomicSource, Build, Lookup)
- Add `vibe-vep prepare` command to pre-build the index
- Strip datasource packages to parsing helpers only
- Use journal_mode=OFF during bulk build to avoid multi-GB WAL file
- 71.7M AlphaMissense + 4.1M ClinVar variants in ~2.5GB SQLite file
- Benchmark: 1.05M TCGA variants, 91.8% AM coverage, 9.1% ClinVar hit rate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Security: sanitize exceptions, add test suite, add CI gates

- Fix credential leak: _get() now catches urllib exceptions and re-raises
  with safe static messages (prevents password/API key exposure in URL
  query params on network errors)
- Add tests/test_security.py: 6 security tests per MCP Security Framework v1.0
- Update publish.yml: security job (pytest + pip-audit + grep checks) must
  pass before PyPI publish

Addresses Patton security assessment 2026-03-04.

commit.message:
Fix rate limiter: auto-wait for tokens, include usage stats in errors

The per-second throttle now auto-queues (waits up to 3s for a token)
instead of immediately failing, which fixes festival imports that make
multiple API calls. All rate limit errors now include usage stats like
"(42/1440 daily calls used, 1398 remaining)". The /usage endpoint now
returns rules explaining limits and caching.

commit.message:
Fix security audit findings: remove hardcoded secrets, XSS, add indexes

- Remove hardcoded "glossarium2026" secret from admin endpoints (use proper admin auth)
- Remove hardcoded admin usernames {"admin1","Magdalena1"} from translator.py
- Fix XSS in admin dashboard by escaping all user-supplied data with html.escape()
- Fix N+1 queries in admin dashboard (bulk load owners + entry counts)
- Add SecurityHeadersMiddleware (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
- Add DB indexes on GlossaryEntry.user_id, glossary_id, created_at
- Raise password minimum from 6 to 8 characters
- Update Procfile to use 2 workers for production
- Don't return plaintext password in reset response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: TWSE API 加入重試機制與 timeout，改善間歇性 500 錯誤

- fetchTWSE 加入最多 2 次重試 + 8 秒 timeout
- errorResponse 區分 TWSE 上游錯誤（502）與內部錯誤（500）
